metadata.name: Create and Manage Container Images
metadata.description: Create container images using Containerfiles, push to registries, and manage image lifecycle
objectives: Create a simple container image by using a Containerfile
Create and run a container by using the container image
Push a container image to a local registry
prerequisites: Access to container registry at registry.lab.example.com:5000

hosts.name: workstation
hosts.description: Workstation for building and managing container images

tasks.name: Verify login to container registry
tasks.description: Student should be logged in to registry.lab.example.com:5000
tasks.success_message: Logged in to container registry as student
tasks.failure_message: Not logged in to container registry

tasks.name: Verify my_image directory exists
tasks.description: The ~/my_image directory should exist for the Containerfile

tasks.name: Verify Containerfile uses ubi10 base image
tasks.description: The final Containerfile should use ubi10/ubi as the base image
tasks.failure_message: Containerfile does not use ubi10/ubi base image
hints: The FROM line should reference registry.lab.example.com:5000/ubi10/ubi
This is the final version (1.1) of the image

tasks.name: Verify Containerfile CMD for ubi10 message
tasks.description: The Containerfile should print the ubi10 message

checks.pattern: This container uses the ubi10/ubi image

tasks.success_message: Containerfile CMD is configured for ubi10 message
tasks.failure_message: Containerfile CMD does not have the ubi10 message
hints: CMD should echo: This container uses the ubi10/ubi image

tasks.name: Verify my_image:1.0 exists in remote registry
tasks.description: The my_image:1.0 image should be pushed to the remote registry
tasks.failure_message: my_image:1.0 is not in the remote registry

tasks.name: Verify my_image:1.1 exists in remote registry
tasks.description: The my_image:1.1 image should be pushed to the remote registry
tasks.failure_message: my_image:1.1 is not in the remote registry

tasks.name: Verify my_image is removed from local storage
tasks.description: Both versions of my_image should be removed from local storage
tasks.success_message: my_image is removed from local storage
tasks.failure_message: my_image still exists in local storage
hints: Remove with: podman rmi my_image:1.0 my_image:1.1

tasks.name: Verify no stopped containers exist
tasks.description: All test containers should be removed
tasks.failure_message: There are stopped containers that need to be removed
